title: Beautysaid Window Film Privacy for Glass Windows, Stained Glass Window Film with Flower, Frosted Window Static Cling without Glue for Home House Door Bedroom Office, Purple, 44.5 x 200cm
features: Floral Privacy with Dancing Rainbows: Our frosted decorative window film exquisite design provides elegant privacy by obscuring views, while transforming harsh sunlight into a soft, ever-changing display of rainbow patterns, enhancing your home's ambience throughout day and night

Two-Way Privacy Day & Night: This opaque window film provides effective privacy in both directions—blocking outside views while preserving your outlook. It welcomes sunlight by day and softly diffuses interior light at night, keeping spaces bright yet discreet without sacrificing comfort

Renter Friendly: Ideal for rented homes and delicate windows, our flower window film applies smoothly with just soapy water—no professional tools or skills needed. It removes without a trace, leaving glass perfectly clean, and can even be repositioned or reused for flexible, worry-free privacy

98% UV Block & Heat Reduction: Our static cling window film shields your home from 98% of UV rays, protecting skin and preventing interior fading. It reduces solar heat to maintain a comfortable room temperature, improve energy efficiency, and ensure year-round comfort

Easy DIY Application - No Experts Needed: Unleash your creativity with our coloured window film! Easily trim and apply to any smooth glass without professional help—perfect for DIY projects and family fun. Ideal for adding a magical touch to bathroom, kitchen, car sunroof, living room, or apartment
